title: Assistant Store Manager - Cafe Coffee Day - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Cafe Coffee Day - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
